/usr/bin/c++  -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/BacktestingEngine.dir/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/BacktestingEngine.dir/src/Data.cpp.o CMakeFiles/BacktestingEngine.dir/src/SimpleMovingAverage.cpp.o CMakeFiles/BacktestingEngine.dir/src/Backtest.cpp.o -o BacktestingEngine
